name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our very first endorsement of 2021!
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Hello
Somebody! We have some HUGE news.

We just endorsed our very first candidate for the year: Senator Nina
Turner in Ohio’s 11th Congressional District.

Nina Turner is a relentless fighter for the people. She has stood with our
progressive movement since Day One. Nina is running to serve in Marcia
Fudge’s soon-to-be vacant seat.

We’re setting a goal to raise Nina Turner $20,000 in the next 48 hours to
help jump-start her campaign in the crowded race to represent OH-11.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/39490?refcode=em20210111-15905&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=15905%2E1203867%2ExoE4V7 ]Will you chip in $3 right now to help us raise $20,000
for Nina Turner’s campaign in the next 48 hours? Every donation will help
Nina Turner grow her campaign, run more ads, and reach more voters in
OH-11.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/39490?refcode=em20210111-15905&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=15905%2E1203867%2ExoE4V7 ]Contribute $3

We know Senator Turner will help create a mission-driven team in Congress
to deliver relief during this pandemic and fight for Medicare for All, a
Green New Deal, racial justice, and getting big money out of politics.

Nina Turner was a national co-chair of Bernie Sanders’ 2020 presidential
campaign. She represented parts of the congressional district as a
Cleveland City Councillor from 2006 to 2008 and an Ohio State Senator from
2008 until 2014. She is rooted in the Cleveland community and knows the
challenges that the district faces.

Nina Turner will join the Squad in fighting for policies that match the
scale of the crises we face. She will be a relentless fighter for justice
and working-class people all across the country.

This is our very first endorsement of 2021 and we want to shake the
political establishment to its core with our movement’s power.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/39490?refcode=em20210111-15905&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=15905%2E1203867%2ExoE4V7 ]Peter,
help us send a message by chipping in
$3 to help us raise $20,000 for Nina Turner in the first 48
hours of us announcing our endorsement.

Thank you for your support. In 2018 we helped elect the Squad. In 2020 we
sent three more Justice Democrats to Congress. Now, with your support, we
can grow our political power even more.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=15905%2E1203867%2ExoE4V7 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=15905%2E1203867%2ExoE4V7 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20210111-15905-footer&t=1024&refcode2=15905_1203867_xoE4V7&akid=15905%2E1203867%2ExoE4V7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=15905%2E1203867%2ExoE4V7

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
P.O. Box 910 Knoxville, TN 37901
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Josh Hawley Under Fire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The political establishment is determined to crush
conservatives everywhere and erase the values that make America
great. And sadly, very few people in Washington are willing to
fight back.

That's what makes Senator Josh Hawley's bold and
principled leadership so important.

The junior senator from Missouri's decision to
object to the election results showed tremendous courage. It
brought him instant scorn from the media and even a public rebuke
from his own Senate leader.

Even worse, Senator Hawley's decision to give voice
to the concerns held by millions of Americans brought protestors
to his own home to harass his wife and newborn child.

And now Simon & Schuster, the publisher of his
upcoming book, has decided to cancel his contract because he
dared to stand up for liberty and fight for election integrity.

It's a "direct assault on the First Amendment," said
Hawley. "This is the Left looking to cancel everyone they don't
approve of. I will fight this cancel culture with everything I
have."

He's right to fight it, and conservatives should
stand shoulder-to-shoulder with him in defending our cherished
values.

We're going to support Senator Hawley by
contributing to Senator Hawley's campaign today.

Please join us by making your own donation to back
this courageous conservative!

The progressive Left may think they have defeated
us, but millions of Americans believe in limited government,
economic freedom, and traditional values.

We will continue to support conservative leaders
like Josh Hawley and do everything we can to secure America's
future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

SUPPORT JOSH HAWLEY

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: As veterans, we WILL defend democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,
Watching the events of last Wednesday unfold in Washington, DC has been absolutely gut-wrenching. Personally, my blood was boiling and I was sick to my stomach. The country I love so much was brought to her knees by domestic terrorists who sought to overturn a democratic election. The President and his enablers encouraged them, calling for 'Trial by Combat' and then remained silent for hours through the chaos. Today, they are trying to literally whitewash American history. These are the facts: armed protesters stormed and defaced our Capitol, forcing members and staff to flee, they [took down the American flag](https://act.myngp.com/el/BQVZeCqW8tdimm_IJjBdstev5YAGxcyFcDM1S6TuPoo=/X7b4iuM-ZYnS2yMQ79DVBcfzwt7Es86ezw74QJ5hRjA=?s=20) flying high and replaced it with a Trump 2020 flag. The images we saw on the internet and TV were something out of a dystopian novel, something that we'd see elsewhere in the world, not here, in a bastion of Democracy.
You many think this is a problem only in DC, but its roots are here and many of the protesters came from all over the country. At least one member of the Pennsylvania legislature, Sen. Doug Mastriano, [was part of the rioting](https://act.myngp.com/el/BQVZeCqW8tdimm_IJjBdstev5YAGxcyFcDM1S6TuPoo=/yqybAWKGA9lg8PM8n8lQipje0pTT6WaVjY9iElG4Um8=). Several busloads of protesters came from Upstate New York and Tennessee, traveling to DC to take part in the violent, anti-democratic protests.
I hope you agree we need to fight to keep officials like Sen. Mastriano and other fear-mongers out of office. We need to elect politicians who think democracy matters.

We have work to do if we are going to help move this country forward, and we cannot let domestic terrorists influence our elections or set our policy. To fight this battle, we need your help.

**[Please encourage your friends and family to join us - and please keep our nation in your prayers during these dark days.](https://act.myngp.com/el/BQVZeCqW8tdimm_IJjBdstev5YAGxcyFcDM1S6TuPoo=/efpMpaeOdDii92SEPIw32l58OA6S23U6RuMSpVdcyNw=)**
In solidarity,
Patrick Murphy
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BQVZeCqW8tdimm_IJjBdstev5YAGxcyFcDM1S6TuPoo=/efpMpaeOdDii92SEPIw32l58OA6S23U6RuMSpVdcyNw=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---

Bristol PA 19007 United States

body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=361A853A20A3822)
---
| | True the Vote Court Battle for Voters' Rights
UPDATE: Countersuit Filed – [True the Vote v. Fair Fight Action](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=361A853A20A3833)

---
| | Friend –

There have been few weeks more pivotal in election integrity than what our country experienced last week. Now, as we face a wave of progressive interests aimed at silencing citizens' voices and removing our ability to petition the government, this update takes on a level of importance that cannot be overstated.

For weeks, the True the Vote team was on the ground in Georgia working hard to provide training, election integrity hotline support, and most significantly, assisting Georgia voters across the state in the filing of over 364,000 Elector Challenges to individuals who did not appear to meet residency requirements.

The election came and went – but the fight did not end there.

In fact, our efforts to defend citizens' rights continue, because what started in Georgia is now part of a lawsuit that asks a very important question for every voter in America **–** do we have rights? And should those rights be protected from intimidation?

On Christmas Eve, Stacey Abrams's group, Fair Fight Action, sued True the Vote and Georgia voters across the state who petitioned their counties in the interest of protecting the right to vote. They sought to restrain us in the filing of citizen challenges and prevent us from future work in the state.

[Their attempt to silence American citizens failed. We won **–** but the fight is far from over.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3Rlcy1lbGVjdGlvbi1pbnRlZ3JpdHktZWZmb3J0cy1hZmZpcm1lZC1ieS1mZWRlcmFsLWNvdXJ0JTJG&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=361A853A20A3823)
Today, [True the Vote filed a countersuit](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=361A853A20A3833) in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Georgia, asking the court to stop Fair Fight Action from continuing its effort to intimidate Georgia voters who lawfully submitted elector challenges in their counties prior to the January 5th election.____
Fair Fight Action’s suit took direct aim at our constitutional rights. If their suit had succeeded, it would have violated the principle of a citizen's right to petition the government and the right to freedom of speech.
Fair Fight Action attacked True the Vote and these courageous citizens, not for breaking the law, but for following it! Georgia law explicitly allows for challenges to voter eligibility if evidence suggests challenged voters no longer live at the address where they are registered.

We cannot and will not let this assault on voters' rights go unanswered.

---
| | [ LEARN MORE ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=361A853A20A3833)
---
| | Today’s countersuit not only asks the court to safeguard Georgia citizens’ rights and True the Vote from Fair Fight Action’s strong-arm tactics, but it establishes our stand against the progressive onslaught to silence the American people. We will not stand by and watch while our rights are taken. For over a decade, True the Vote has worked to preserve voters’ rights and election integrity. We’re not stopping now.

The attacks on the rights of citizens and states will not stop. We won’t either; stand with us.
Ever onward,

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
True the Vote Founder

Peter, the situation is dire.

**In 2020 over 100,000 small businesses closed forever, and we’re still losing 800 small businesses every day!**

These aren’t just stats on a sheet of paper. Every closed small business represents:

**➡ Dozens of Jobs Lost**
**➡ Generational Family Businesses Ended**
**➡ Communities Destroyed**
**➡ American Dreams Ended**

I’ve worked for small businesses my whole life and come from a family of small business owners. I know how hard it is to keep the lights on, and the doors open. I’ll be blunt — it _**INFURIATES**_ me to see Democrats crush the businesses that are the very backbone and soul of our country.

**Democrats won’t stop until they kill every small business left...**

With Democrats now in control of Washington, there’s no one coming to save our small businesses.

_It’s up to us alone, Peter. _
